The suggested assessment for Week 12 is a policy memo on a public policy problem using the eightfold path method.
The suggested assessment for Week 13 is a deliberation exercise on an environmental policy issue.
The suggested assessment for Week 14 is an advocacy coalition mapping exercise.
The suggested assessment for Week 15 is a comparative analysis of institutional reform initiatives in different countries.
These assessments and readings are recommendations and can be supplemented with additional materials based on the course objectives and teaching style.

Durrës, one of the most important towns in Albania located on the Adriatic Sea, has faced significant challenges to its cultural and economic sustainability due to environmental factors such as coastal erosion and sea level rise.

Coastal erosion has led to a significant loss of beach sand, degradation of the coastline, and damage to infrastructure in Durrës, reducing the beach size and causing a decline in tourism, which is a major source of revenue for the town.
The coastal erosion in Durrës has damaged the beach promenade, negatively impacting the cultural identity of the town.
Sea level rise, caused by climate change and global warming, has resulted in frequent and severe flooding in Durrës, leading to property damage and affecting the economic sustainability of the town.
The flooding in Durrës has also impacted the cultural sustainability of the town by damaging historically significant buildings such as the Byzantine city walls.

The Albanian government has implemented various measures to address the impact of coastal erosion and sea level rise in Durrës. A project was initiated to construct groins to reduce the impact of coastal erosion in the town. Beach nourishment has also been implemented to replenish the sand on the beach, thus enhancing tourism.

To mitigate the impact of sea level rise and minimize the risk of flooding, the government has constructed coastal defense walls to prevent flooding in low-lying areas. The municipality has invested in flood prevention infrastructure, such as drainage systems, to reduce the impact of flooding.

Efforts have been made to preserve Durrës' cultural heritage. The Albanian government has established regulations and laws to protect ancient heritage sites, such as the Byzantine city walls and the amphitheater, from damage due to coastal erosion and sea level rise. Archaeological surveys have been conducted to protect and preserve cultural heritage.

The Albanian government is promoting renewable energy projects in Durrës to reduce dependence on fossil fuels and cut carbon emissions. A wind farm project is being planned to tap into the region's strong winds.

The municipality of Durrës has initiated waste management programs to reduce littering and promote a cleaner environment. This includes placing more waste bins on the streets, encouraging recycling, and promoting waste reduction practices.

The Albanian government is promoting eco-tourism in Durrës as a way of promoting sustainability while providing economic opportunities. This includes promoting sustainable tourism practices, such as reducing the use of plastic and encouraging responsible tourism behavior.

The government is promoting sustainable transportation in Durrës to reduce carbon emissions and promote cleaner transport. This includes promoting cycling and pedestrian options, and investing in public transport infrastructure.
The waste management program in Durrës has resulted in cleaner streets, improving the overall appearance of the town.
The beach nourishment program in Durrës has increased the beach size, attracting more tourists and boosting the local economy.
The promotion of eco-tourism in Durrës has encouraged visitors to engage in sustainable practices, such as reducing their use of plastic, benefiting the environment.
Investments in renewable energy projects in Durrës have reduced reliance on fossil fuels, contributing to decreased air pollution and mitigating climate change.
Sustainable transportation initiatives in Durrës have led to fewer cars on the roads, resulting in improved air quality.

The Albanian government has set a goal to increase the country's share of renewable energy to 38% by 2020, which will involve further investment in renewable energy projects and infrastructure in Durrës.

The Albanian government is committed to promoting sustainable agriculture practices, such as agroforestry, to improve soil health, benefit small farmers, and reduce deforestation. Programs promoting the use of traditional crops requiring limited water and providing market access may benefit farmers in Durrës and surrounding communities.

In Job 16:18, Job specifically recalls the earth in his lament, appealing to the theological understanding of the earth as a symbol of justice in the Old Testament. He says, "O earth, do not cover my blood," asking the earth not to ignore or forget his unjust death, which should cry out for justice on his behalf.

In the ancient Near Eastern worldview, the earth was seen as a physical manifestation of God's justice. If someone was unjustly killed, the earth was expected to "open its mouth" and swallow up the blood of the victim, thereby crying out for justice on their behalf.

In Job 17:16, Job stated that he may go down to the bars of Sheol but at the same time descend into the dust. The "bars of Sheol" were seen as the gates of the underworld, the place where the dead dwelled. To "descend into the dust" was another metaphor for death, as the body of the dead was believed to return to the earth from which it was formed.

In Job 17:15-16, Job expresses his deep sadness and despair at his situation, seeing death as the only hope for release from his suffering. He states, "I will not be with you much longer, you will look for me, but I will be gone." Job describes his desire for death to come and bring an end to his suffering by saying he will "go down to the bars of Sheol" and "descend into the dust."
tags: "I will not be with you much longer"
"go down to the bars of Sheol"

semantic_nodes.semantic_memory: For Job, death is not just a physical event but also a spiritual release. In the ancient Near Eastern worldview, Sheol was seen as a place where the dead lived in a state of unconsciousness, free from the pain and suffering of this world. Job's expression "go down to the bars of Sheol" reflects his hope that death will bring him release from his pain and suffering and allow him to rest in peace.
tags: "go down to the bars of Sheol"

semantic_nodes.semantic_memory: Job views death as a way to escape the injustice and suffering he has experienced, seeing it as a means to find a place of peace and rest. He expresses his hope that death will bring him justice and vindication that he feels has been denied to him in life.

In the book of Job, Job's friends—Eliphaz, Bildad, and Zophar—are considered "comforters," but their attempts to console Job and explain his suffering are ultimately deemed incorrect by God. They correctly identify God's attributes of holiness and justice, but their understanding is limited and misguided.

Job's friends believe that suffering is always a consequence of sin, and that God only punishes the wicked. Consequently, they assume Job must have sinned to deserve his suffering and repeatedly urge him to confess his sins and repent.

Job, described as a righteous man, experiences suffering not due to any personal sin but because God allows him to be tested. This divine test contradicts the friends' belief that suffering is always linked to sin.

The friends of Job cannot be certain that Job is not wicked, and their assumption that he must be suffering because of some sin he has committed is unwarranted. In the ancient Near Eastern worldview, the common understanding was that suffering was a direct result of sin, and the friends of Job appear to subscribe to this view.

The book of Job challenges the common understanding by showing that Job's righteousness is clear, yet he still experiences great suffering, highlighting the limitations of the friends' understanding and the inaccuracy of their assumptions about the relationship between suffering and sin.

Only through God's revelation do the friends of Job come to realize their error and the limitations of their understanding. God rebukes them for their misguided words, and in Job 42:7, Job intercedes on their behalf, asking God to forgive them.

The book of Job does not necessarily contradict the teachings in the book of Deuteronomy, but it challenges the assumption prevalent in the ancient Near Eastern world that suffering is always a result of sin. This belief is expressed in Deuteronomy, linking blessings and curses to obedience and disobedience to God's commands.

While Deuteronomy presents a direct correlation between obedience and blessings and between disobedience and curses, the book of Job demonstrates that this relationship is not always straightforward. Job, a righteous man, experiences great suffering, questioning the idea that suffering is always due to sin.

The book of Job offers a nuanced perspective on the relationship between suffering, sin, and God's justice, providing a deeper understanding of the complexities of the human experience and the relationship between suffering and sin. It shows that God's ways are often beyond human understanding.

While the friends of Job are not necessarily wrong in their understanding of the relationship between sin and suffering as expressed in the book of Deuteronomy, their application of this understanding to Job's situation is misguided.

The friends of Job assume that Job must be suffering because of some sin he has committed, based on a limited understanding of the relationship between suffering and sin, and ignoring the complexities of the human experience.
The book of Job demonstrates that there can be other reasons for suffering, such as testing, and that righteous people can still experience suffering even if they have not sinned.
The friends of Job were ultimately wrong in their application of the teachings in Deuteronomy to Job's situation, and their attempts at comfort only added to Job's distress.

The book of Job does not directly address whether God intended to punish Job's friends, but it is clear that God rebukes the friends for their misguided words, indicating that their understanding of the situation was not accurate.
There are 7 days in a week, ranging from Monday to Sunday.
To prioritize morning tasks, identify the most important non-negotiable tasks such as exercising, meditating, journaling, or enjoying a cup of coffee.

Use the Eisenhower Matrix to categorize tasks into four quadrants: Urgent & Important, Important but Not Urgent, Urgent but Not Important, and Not Urgent or Important. Focus on Urgent & Important tasks first.
Prioritize tasks based on energy levels. Morning people should tackle challenging or creative tasks first, while others should start with simpler tasks.
Create a "Stop Doing" list to identify non-essential tasks that can be eliminated or delegated from the morning routine.
Batch similar tasks together, such as checking and responding to emails, or doing a quick 10-minute workout.
Set a "Top 3" list of the most important tasks to accomplish in the morning and focus on these first.
Make time for self-care activities in the morning, such as stretching, reading, or taking deep breaths.
Experiment with different morning routines and tasks for a week or two, and adjust based on what works best.

To wind down before bed, avoid screens for at least an hour as the blue light can suppress melatonin production, making it harder to fall asleep. Gradually dim the lights to signal to your brain that it's time to sleep. Create a cozy atmosphere using table lamps, candles, or string lights.
Listening to calming music, nature sounds, or white noise can create a relaxing ambiance. Apps like Calm, Rainy Mood, or SimplyNoise can be used for these sounds.

Engage in relaxing activities such as reading, journaling, or gentle stretches to slow down your mind and body. Inhaling the calming scents of essential oils like lavender, chamomile, or valerian root through a diffuser or applying them to your skin can also help.
Taking a warm bath or shower can relax your muscles and calm your mind. Adding Epsom salts or essential oils enhances relaxation.
Enjoying a warm, non-caffeinated tea like chamomile, peppermint, or passionfruit tea can promote relaxation.

Establish a consistent sleep schedule by setting a realistic bedtime and sticking to it, even on weekends. Aim for 7-9 hours of sleep each night. Gradually adjust your bedtime by going to bed 15-30 minutes earlier each night until you reach your desired bedtime.
Set a consistent wake-up time, even on weekends, to regulate your body's internal clock. Develop a calming pre-sleep routine that includes activities like reading, journaling, or meditation.
Make your sleep environment comfortable by ensuring your bedroom is dark, quiet, and at a comfortable temperature. Invest in a supportive mattress and comfortable pillows.

Avoid stimulating activities like exercise, playing video games, or watching exciting movies at least 2-3 hours before bedtime. Get some morning sunlight to regulate your circadian rhythms, making it easier to fall asleep at night.
Setting a specific time to stop using your phone can be a highly effective way to establish a digital detox before bed. The key is to find a time that works for you and your lifestyle.
Stopping phone use 1-2 hours before bed allows your brain to wind down and relax, making it easier to fall asleep.
By stopping phone use earlier, you'll reduce your exposure to blue light, which can suppress melatonin production and make it harder to fall asleep.
A digital detox before bed can lead to better sleep quality, as you're giving your brain a chance to relax and recharge.
Choose a specific time, like 9 or 10 PM, and make it a non-negotiable part of your daily routine.
Enable features like Screen Time on iOS or Digital Wellbeing on Android to track your phone usage and set time limits for specific apps or categories.
Designate your bedroom as a phone-free zone to associate it with sleep and relaxation.
Replace phone time with relaxing activities like reading, journaling, or listening to calming music.
Consistency is key. Try to stick to your designated phone-free time even on weekends or days off.
Develop a short routine to signal to your brain that it's time to put the phone away, such as storing your phone in a designated spot or doing a quick stretch.
Apps like Freedom, SelfControl, or Moment can help you stay on track and block distracting websites or apps during your designated phone-free time.
User plans to set their phone-free time to 9:30 PM and seeks advice on maintaining motivation and adherence to morning and bedtime routines.
Agent recommends using a habit tracker, journal, or apps like Habitica, HabitBull, or Strides to monitor progress and stay motivated.
Agent suggests setting reminders for morning and bedtime routines to ensure adherence.
Agent advises sharing goals with an accountability partner, such as a friend or family member.
Agent recommends celebrating milestones, such as completing a week of morning routines or 30 days of phone-free time before bed.
Agent suggests starting with one or two habits at a time and gradually adding more as momentum builds.
Agent advises preparing everything needed for the morning routine the night before to make it easier to start.
Agent recommends creating a designated area for the morning routine, like a meditation corner or cozy reading nook.
Agent suggests incorporating enjoyable activities into routines, such as reading, listening to music, or practicing yoga.
Agent advises being flexible, not being too hard on oneself if a day is missed, and getting back on track quickly.
Agent recommends reflecting on the reasons for starting the routines and how they benefit overall well-being.
Agent suggests making routines into rituals by doing them at the same time every day, even on weekends or days off.
Agent advises aiming for 7-9 hours of sleep to ensure being well-rested and energized for the morning routine.
Agent recommends drinking water throughout the day to maintain energy levels and focus.
User feels unenthusiastic about waking up early and seeks ways to make the morning routine more enjoyable to increase motivation.

Adding something the user loves can enhance the morning routine. Suggestions include listening to favorite music, enjoying a cup of coffee or tea, spending time reading, or taking a short walk outside.

Creating a sensory experience in the morning can make the routine more enjoyable. This includes using soft, warm lighting, incorporating scents through essential oils or scented candles, adding plush towels or a cozy blanket, and adjusting the temperature.

Incorporating activities that bring joy can improve the morning routine. Suggestions include engaging in a gentle exercise routine like yoga, journaling or drawing for creative expression, practicing mindfulness, and playing a musical instrument or solving puzzles.

Turning the morning routine into a ritual can make it more meaningful. Ideas include creating a morning mantra, using a special mug or cup, lighting a candle, and enjoying the routine as a solo activity for self-reflection.
Adding music, a short walk, and journaling to your morning routine can be a great way to boost your mood and set a positive tone for the day.

To make journaling a habit, begin with a manageable commitment like journaling for 5-10 minutes, 3-4 times a week. Choose a specific time of day that works for you, like first thing in the morning or right before bed.
Designate a quiet, comfortable spot where you can journal without distractions. Establish a short ritual, like making a cup of tea or lighting a candle, to signal the start of your journaling time.

Don’t worry too much about grammar, spelling, or coherence. Focus on getting your thoughts and feelings down on paper. Attach journaling to an existing habit, like right after brushing your teeth or before getting dressed.

Use a habit tracker or a journaling app to monitor your progress and stay motivated. Try different journaling styles, like bullet journaling, free writing, or prompts, to find what works best for you.

It may take some time to develop a consistent journaling habit. Be gentle with yourself, and don’t get discouraged if you miss a day or two. Regularly reflect on your journaling experience and adjust your approach as needed.

Write without editing, focusing on your current thoughts, feelings, and experiences. Use prompts like "What am I grateful for today?" or "What's been on my mind lately?" Include reflections on your experiences, lessons learned, and goals.
Use journaling as a way to relax, unwind, and practice self-care.
Experiment with different styles and don’t be afraid to adjust your approach as needed.

episodic_nodes.observation: User Say: How does Procter & Gamble ensure that its products are safe for consumer use?
episodic_nodes.action:
Agent Say: I don't have access to current information or data. however, here are some of the general methods that procter & gamble (p&g) usually follows to ensure that its products are safe for consumer use:

1. quality control: p&g has a rigorous quality control process in place where each product is tested before it is launched in the market. the quality control process involves a series of tests to ensure that the product is safe for use.

2. compliance with regulations: p&g follows all the local and international regulations set by the governing authorities. this includes the use of safe ingredients, labeling requirements, and packaging regulations.

3. ingredient selection: p&g carefully selects the ingredients used in its products, ensuring their safety and compliance with local and international regulations. the company also conducts extensive research on the potential health and environmental impacts of the ingredients used in its products.

4. monitoring: p&g monitors its products throughout their life cycle to ensure that they continue to meet safety standards. this includes monitoring customer feedback, conducting quality control tests, and making adjustments as necessary.

5. research and development: p&g invests heavily in research and development to develop safer products. the company has a team of scientists who conduct extensive studies to ensure that its products are safe and effective.

overall, procter & gamble takes a comprehensive approach to ensure product safety, from ingredient selection to quality control, regulatory compliance, and ongoing monitoring.

episodic_nodes.observation: User Say: That sounds like P&G takes product safety seriously. Have they had any incidents in the past where their products caused harm to consumers?
episodic_nodes.action:
Agent Say: I don't have access to up-to-date information on p&g's history with product safety. however, like most large companies, p&g has faced some incidents related to product safety in the past.

one of the most significant cases was the 1982 tylenol tampering incident, where someone added cyanide to tylenol capsules, causing the deaths of seven people. tylenol was a product of mcneil consumer products, a subsidiary of johnson & johnson, but the incident spurred p&g and other companies to improve tamper-proof packaging to protect consumers.

in another example, in 2015, p&g recalled some of its old spice deodorant products due to reports of skin irritation caused by chemicals in the product.

however, it's worth noting that p&g has a long history of taking product safety seriously and, for the most part, has had a good track record in ensuring the safety of its products. the company has implemented many safety measures and procedures to prevent such incidents from occurring in the future, including conducting regular safety audits, implementing quality control systems, and improving packaging security.

episodic_nodes.observation: User Say: It's good to know that P&G is taking steps to prevent incidents like that from happening again. I appreciate companies that prioritize product safety.
episodic_nodes.action: Agent Say: I couldn't agree more! it's important for companies to prioritize the safety of their customers, and consumers have the right to know that the products they use are safe. it's encouraging to see companies like p&g taking a proactive approach to product safety, implementing robust safety protocols, and working to continuously improve their products to ensure their safety. ultimately, this ensures that customers can trust the products they buy and use, leading to a positive and reliable relationship between the company and its customers.

episodic_nodes.observation: User Say: Yeah, I remember the Tylenol incident. It was a scary time. But it's good to see that companies have improved product safety measures since then. As a consumer, it gives me peace of mind.
episodic_nodes.action: Agent Say: Indeed, the Tylenol tampering incident was a significant event that highlighted the importance of product safety and the need for measures to ensure the integrity and safety of products. Since then, many companies have implemented tamper-evident packaging, and there have been numerous advances in product safety measures to prevent such incidents from occurring in the future. These measures not only protect consumers, but they also build trust and loyalty with customers, which can have a positive impact on a company's reputation and long-term success. It's always reassuring to know that companies take product safety seriously and are taking steps to ensure their products are safe for consumer use.

episodic_nodes.observation: User Say: Definitely! It's great to see companies taking measures to keep consumers safe. Do you know if there's anything consumers can do to ensure the safety of the products they use at home?
episodic_nodes.action:
Agent Say: Absolutely! While companies like P&G take extensive measures to ensure the safety of their products, there are also some steps consumers can take to ensure the products they use at home are safe. Here are some tips:

1. Read product labels carefully: Product labels contain important information about the ingredients and usage instructions. It's essential to read them carefully before using a product, especially if you have allergies or sensitivities.

2. Store products properly: Products should be stored in their original packaging in a safe and secure place, out of reach of children and pets. Certain products, like cleaning chemicals and medications, may require additional safety precautions when it comes to storage and handling.

3. Follow usage instructions: Follow the usage instructions on product labels carefully. Never use a product for purposes other than those specified on the label.

4. Discontinue use if you experience any adverse reactions: If you experience any adverse reactions like skin irritation, breathing difficulty or any other illness after using a product, discontinue use immediately and seek medical attention.

By following these tips, consumers can ensure that they use products safely and reduce the risk of accidents or adverse reactions.

episodic_nodes.observation: User Say: How do farmers in South China access credit to purchase needed supplies?
episodic_nodes.action:
Agent Say: As an AI language model, I don't have access to the latest information, but historically, farmers in South China have been able to access credit in a number of different ways:

1. Traditional banks: Farmers can access credit from traditional banks. However, accessing credit from banks may require collateral, which is usually in the form of property such as land or a house.

2. Microfinance Institutions: Farmers can access credit from microfinance institutions that specialize in providing small loans to farmers who are unable to access credit from traditional banks. In many cases, microfinance institutions do not require collateral and only charge low-interest rates.

3. Government-backed loans: The government provides credit to farmers at low-interest rates. These loans are usually tied to specific agricultural programs or initiatives and are often only available to members of specific farming cooperatives.

4. Peer-to-peer lending: Farmers can access credit from other farmers or investors through peer-to-peer lending platforms. These platforms provide farmers with access to credit at lower interest rates than traditional banks.

5. Agricultural suppliers: Finally, farmers can access credit from agricultural suppliers who provide seeds, fertilizers, and other inputs. These suppliers often provide credit to farmers in order to ensure a steady supply of their products. However, the interest rates may be high.

episodic_nodes.observation: User Say: Interesting! Do you have any idea which of these options farmers in South China prefer the most?
episodic_nodes.action: Agent Say: As an AI language model, I don't have access to the latest information on the preferences of farmers in South China regarding credit access. However, it may depend on factors such as the credit requirements, interest rates, collateral requirements, and the availability of credit in their localities. Some farmers may prefer government-backed loans due to lower interest rates, while others may opt for microfinance institutions due to the flexibility of their loan requirements. Agricultural suppliers may be preferred by farmers who require inputs in order to grow their crops. Ultimately, the most preferred option may depend on the specific needs and circumstances of individual farmers.

episodic_nodes.observation: User Say: I had no idea farmers in South China had so many options for accessing credit. Do you know if there are any challenges they face in getting approved for loans?
episodic_nodes.action:
Agent Say: As an AI language model, I can inform you that farmers in South China, like most small-scale farmers around the world, may face significant challenges in accessing credit. These challenges may include:

1. Limited access to formal credit institutions due to lack of collateral or other requirements. 2. High-interest rates charged by formal credit institutions. 3. Insufficient documentation or financial records to support loan applications. 4. Limited access to information on available credit options. 5. Lack of credit history and credit scores. 6. Unstable incomes due to weather conditions, market failures or price fluctuation, which makes it difficult for lenders to assess the creditworthiness of farmers. 7. Inadequate infrastructure in rural areas that make it difficult for farmers to access credit institutions. 8. Bureaucratic red tape in obtaining loans. 9. Inadequate understanding of the credit system among farmers, and other socio-economic barriers such as language, literacy and gender bias. These challenges may be more pronounced in rural areas where the majority of farmers in South China reside.

episodic_nodes.observation: User Say: What strategies would you suggest for a mentor to motivate their mentee who seems to lack enthusiasm?
episodic_nodes.action:
Agent Say: As an AI language model, I don't have personal experiences and feelings, but here are some strategies that a mentor might suggest for motivating a mentee who seems to lack enthusiasm, based on research and best practices:

1. Understand their goals: It's important to know what motivates your mentee. Discuss their goals and aspirations, and help them find ways to align their interests with their goals.

2. Celebrate small wins: Encourage your mentee to celebrate small wins and accomplishments, no matter how small they may seem. Celebrating progress can help build momentum and enthusiasm.

3. Set incremental goals: Help your mentee set realistic and achievable goals. Breaking down larger goals into smaller, more manageable ones can make the journey feel less daunting and more manageable, which can help boost enthusiasm.

4. Discuss obstacles: Identify any obstacles that may be hindering your mentee's enthusiasm, and work together to develop a plan to overcome them.

5. Provide feedback: Offer constructive feedback on your mentee's progress and provide encouragement and support along the way.

6. Challenge them: Encourage your mentee to step out of their comfort zone and take on new challenges. A sense of accomplishment can boost enthusiasm and motivation.

7. Connect them with a network: Help your mentee connect with others who share their interests or work in their desired field. This can help them feel more passionate and connected to their work.

8. Lead by example: Show enthusiasm for your own work and engage in activities that spark your own passion. This can encourage your mentee to do the same.

episodic_nodes.observation: User Say: I think I'll try celebrating small wins with my mentee and help them set incremental goals. Do you have any suggestions for how to track progress towards these smaller goals?
episodic_nodes.action:
Agent Say: Yes, here are a few suggestions for tracking progress towards smaller goals:

1. Develop a tracking system: Create a system for tracking progress such as a spreadsheet, a planner, or a task management app. This will allow your mentee to visually see progress and stay motivated. 2. Set deadlines and milestones: Help your mentee set deadlines and milestones for each small goal, so they have a timeline to work towards. 3. Check-ins: Schedule regular check-ins with your mentee to discuss their progress towards their goals. Use this time to offer feedback and support, and to adjust their goals if necessary. 4. Celebrate progress: As your mentee meets their smaller goals, take time to celebrate their accomplishments. This will reinforce positive behavior and keep them motivated. 5. Reinforce accountability: Encourage your mentee to hold themselves accountable for meeting their goals. Help them develop a plan for staying on track and recommitting to their goals if they fall off track. 6. Reflect on progress: Take time to reflect on progress made towards smaller goals at the end of each month, quarter, or year. Use this to identify what worked and what didn't, and to celebrate successes and adjust goals for the next period.

episodic_nodes.observation: User Say: I like the idea of having regular check-ins to track progress towards smaller goals. How often do you recommend having these check-ins?
episodic_nodes.action:
Agent Say: The frequency of check-ins might depend on the specific context of the mentor-mentee relationship, and the duration of the project or goals, but generally, it is recommended to have check-ins on a regular basis, such as weekly or bi-weekly. 

These check-ins should create a space for open communication and honest feedback, where the mentee has the opportunity to ask questions, raise concerns, and report progress. 

Having these consistent check-ins also allows mentors to identify when their mentee is off track and redirect them toward achieving their goals. By regularly monitoring progress, the mentor can make suggestions that will help the mentee stay motivated, tackle obstacles, and achieve their goals.

episodic_nodes.observation: User Say: I appreciate these recommendations! I think I'll start with a weekly check-in schedule and see how it goes. Do you have any tips for keeping these check-ins engaging and productive?
episodic_nodes.action:
Agent Say: Yes, here are some tips for keeping your check-ins with your mentee engaging and productive:

1. Set a clear agenda: Before each check-in, share an agenda with your mentee so they know what to expect and are prepared to discuss any relevant topics, issues or progress since the last session.

2. Ask open-ended questions: Use open-ended questions to encourage your mentee to speak about how they are feeling, their challenges, achievements or even any suggestions they have for improving the mentorship program. This could keep these check-ins engaging and ensure they feel heard.

3. Active listening: Practice active listening by paying attention to their tone and body language, and respond in a way that shows you understand what they are saying. Recap what they've said before offering any advice or suggestions.

4. Focus on progress: Recognize and discuss the progress that mentee has made since the last session, even if it's small, and remind them of how far they have come. Positive reinforcement can be a great motivator for continuing to make progress.

5. Celebrate achievements: Encourage your mentee to share any small or big successes they have had since the last session and take time to celebrate those successes.

6. Provide actionable feedback: When needed, provide feedback that is clear and specific about what they need to change or adjust. Offer suggestions that can help them make progress.

7. Use visual aids: Share progress charts or a visual representation of their progress to make it more interesting and engaging. 

Overall, the goal is to create an environment that is comfortable and collaborative, where they feel free to share, learn, and grow.

episodic_nodes.observation: User Say: These are great tips! I'll make sure to keep them in mind and try to create a positive and engaging atmosphere during our check-ins.
episodic_nodes.action: Agent Say: I'm glad I could help. Remember, the most important thing is to establish a positive and supportive relationship with your mentee, with open communication and mutual trust. By keeping these tips in mind and consistently offering support and feedback, you can help your mentee achieve their goals and reach their full potential. Good luck!

episodic_nodes.observation: User Say: I feel much more confident starting these regular check-ins and supporting my mentee. I'll be sure to keep you updated on our progress!
episodic_nodes.action: Agent Say: Do keep me updated on how it goes, and don't hesitate to reach out if you have any further questions or need additional support. I'm here to help! Good luck!

episodic_nodes.observation: User Say: Hey, quick follow-up question - do you have any tips on how to handle it if my mentee doesn't seem to make progress towards their goals or seems to be losing motivation?
episodic_nodes.action:
Agent Say: Sure, here are some tips to help you handle the situation if your mentee is struggling to make progress or is losing motivation towards their goals:

1. Revisit their goals: Review the goals they set and ensure that they're still relevant and achievable. If not, help them adjust their goals or create a plan to make them more attainable.

2. Identify the barriers: Try to identify any barriers or obstacles that are preventing your mentee from making progress. Encourage them to be honest about their challenges and brainstorm ways to overcome them.

3. Offer support: Offer support and guidance whenever possible. Show them that you are invested in their success and ready to help them through whatever struggles they might be facing.

4. Reframe mistakes: Help them see mistakes and failures as opportunities for learning and growth. Encourage them to develop a growth mindset that sees failure as a natural part of the learning process.

5. Celebrate what they've done well: Recognize and celebrate the progress they have made thus far, even if it is small, as it is important to maintain motivation and positive momentum.

6. Revisit the mentor-mentee agreement: Take a look at the mentor-mentee agreement, and ensure you both are on the same page. Check-in with them to ensure that they feel that the agreed-upon goals, methods, and frequency of check-ins are appropriate.

7. Reevaluate your approach: Consider if your communication methods or mentorship style could be more effective. Try different approaches and see if they work better.

8. Encourage self-reflection: Encourage your mentee to reflect on their progress, areas for improvement, and how they can take ownership of their goals.

Remember, it's okay to experience setbacks and obstacles. Motivation can come and go. Focus on keeping a supportive relationship with your mentee and be patient and encouraging. Remind them that progress is not always linear and with effort, dedication, and support, they can achieve their goals.

episodic_nodes.observation: User Say: How has Howard University involved students in its efforts to build partnerships with local businesses, community organizations, and government entities, and what benefits have those students derived from those partnerships?
episodic_nodes.action:
Agent Say: I don't have personal experiences or opinions, but here's the information that might help:

howard university has involved its students in various ways to build partnerships with local businesses, community organizations, and government entities. here are a few examples:

1. the howard university small business development center (sbdc):
the sbdc is a resource center that helps small businesses with training, counseling, and technical assistance. howard university students can participate in the center as interns and work directly with small business owners. this collaboration allows students to gain practical experience, improve their skills, and expand their network. 

2. the office of community engagement:
the office of community engagement at howard university serves as a liaison between the university and the local community. the office creates partnerships with community organizations and government entities to address social issues and promote economic development. howard university students can participate in various community service projects and internships through this office. these opportunities help students to develop leadership skills, increase cultural awareness, and contribute to the community.

3. howard university's school of business:
the school of business at howard university has a strong emphasis on experiential learning. students can participate in various programs such as the entrepreneurship fellows program and the bison consulting group, where they work with local businesses and non-profits to provide consulting services. through these programs, howard university students gain practical experience, improve their communication skills, and gain exposure to industry professionals.

the benefits that students derive from these partnerships include:

1. practical experience and skills development: working with local businesses, community organizations, and government entities provides hands-on experience for students. they develop skills such as project management, communication, problem-solving, and critical thinking.

2. networking opportunities: through these partnerships, students can build relationships with industry professionals and community leaders. this network can be valuable when seeking internships or career opportunities.

3. social impact and awareness: participating in community service projects and working with local organizations allows students to contribute to the community and increase their awareness of social issues. this experience can create a sense of social responsibility and inspire students to become more involved in their communities.

episodic_nodes.observation: User Say: Can you provide some specific examples of successful partnerships that Howard University has established with local businesses and organizations?
episodic_nodes.action:
Agent Say: I'd be happy to provide some examples of successful partnerships that Howard University has established with local businesses and organizations:

1. Howard University-Amazon Web Services (AWS) partnership:
In 2019, Howard University partnered with Amazon Web Services to launch a cloud computing degree program. The partnership aims to prepare students for careers in cloud computing and provide access to AWS certification courses. As part of the partnership, AWS provides curriculum development, guest lectures from industry experts, and internships for Howard University students.

2. Howard University-Booz Allen Hamilton partnership:
In 2018, Howard University's Graduate School of Business partnered with Booz Allen Hamilton, the global consulting firm, to launch an Executive MBA program. The partnership provides a curriculum that combines traditional classroom learning with hands-on consulting experience. Booz Allen Hamilton provides guest speakers, mentors, and internship opportunities to Howard students.

3. Howard University-DC Department of Small and Local Business Development (DSLBD) partnership:
Howard University has collaborated with DC's Department of Small and Local Business Development to create the "Howard-District Business Incubator" program. This program provides resources and support to local small businesses in DC, including business planning, marketing support, and access to capital. Howard University students work with these businesses, providing consulting services and support.

4. Howard University-National Aeronautics and Space Administration (NASA) partnership:
Howard University has a long-standing relationship with NASA, providing research and internship opportunities for students in various fields. NASA collaborates with Howard University on several programs, such as the NSF Scholarships in Science, Technology, Engineering, and Mathematics (STEM) and the Center for Research and Education in Optical Sciences and Applications.

These are just a few examples of successful partnerships that have had a positive impact on Howard University students and the local community. These partnerships have provided access to innovative programs, networking opportunities, and hands-on experience that prepare students for their future careers.

episodic_nodes.observation: User Say: What kind of internship opportunities does Howard University offer its students through partnerships with local organizations?
episodic_nodes.action:
Agent Say: Howard University offers various internship opportunities to its students through partnerships with local organizations. Here are a few examples:

1. D.C. Government Internship Program:
Howard University coordinates with various D.C. Government agencies to provide internship opportunities for its students. Through this program, students can gain experience in fields such as public service, policy, and administration. Students work directly with government officials and gain insight into the workings of local government.

2. JPMorgan Chase & Co. Internship Program:
Through its partnership with JPMorgan Chase & Co., Howard University offers internship opportunities for its students in areas such as finance, information technology, and operations. Students work alongside industry professionals, gaining hands-on experience and developing their skills.

3. International Business Internship Program:
Howard University partners with various organizations to provide international business internship opportunities. Through this program, students can gain experience in areas such as marketing, management, and entrepreneurship in locations such as Brazil, Ghana, and South Africa.

4. Howard University Hospital Internship Program:
Howard University Hospital offers internship opportunities to students in various health-related fields, such as nursing, medicine, and pharmacy. Students work alongside healthcare professionals, gaining hands-on experience in a real-world healthcare environment.

5. U.S. Department of Agriculture Internship Program:
Howard University partners with the U.S. Department of Agriculture to provide internship opportunities for its students in areas such as policy, research, and education. Students work alongside USDA professionals, learning about the organization and gaining experience in their field.

These internship opportunities provide Howard University students with valuable experience, networking opportunities, and practical skills that prepare them for their future careers.

episodic_nodes.observation: User Say: Can you tell me more about the impact of Howard University's partnerships on the local community? How have these collaborations helped to address social issues and promote economic development in the Washington D.C. area?
episodic_nodes.action:
Agent Say: Howard University's partnerships have had a significant impact on the local community. These collaborations have helped to address social issues and promote economic development in the Washington D.C. area in various ways, some of which are listed below:

1. Community service projects:
Through partnerships with local organizations, Howard University students have participated in numerous community service projects that have a positive impact on the community. For example, students have volunteered at schools, community centers, and shelters, providing support services and promoting health and wellness programs.

2. Small business development:
Howard University's support of small businesses has been key to promoting economic development in the Washington D.C. area. By partnering with local organizations and government entities, Howard University has launched programs that help small businesses with training, counseling, and technical assistance. These programs have helped small businesses to grow and thrive, creating job opportunities and promoting economic growth in the District of Columbia.

3. Healthcare access:
Howard University has been instrumental in providing improved access to healthcare services for underserved populations in the Washington D.C. area. Through partnerships with local health clinics and hospitals, Howard University has provided health education, medical assistance, and support for patients with chronic illnesses.

4. Education and youth development:
Howard University has made a concerted effort to engage with local schools and community centers to support education and youth development initiatives. Through partnerships with organizations such as Boys and Girls Clubs, Howard University has provided mentoring, tutoring, and college preparation programs for youth in the Washington D.C. area.

In summary, Howard University's partnerships have helped to address social issues and promote economic development in the Washington D.C. area through community service projects, small business development, healthcare access, and education and youth development initiatives. By collaborating with local organizations and government entities, Howard University has strengthened its ties to the local community while providing valuable learning experiences for its students.

episodic_nodes.observation: User Say: Can you provide any examples of how Howard University's partnerships have specifically addressed issues of racial and social justice in the Washington D.C. area?
episodic_nodes.action:
Agent Say: Sure, from my understanding, here are a few examples of Howard University's partnerships that have specifically addressed issues of racial and social justice in the Washington D.C. area:

1. Social Justice Law Clinic:
Howard University's School of Law established the Social Justice Law Clinic to provide legal representation to underserved communities, particularly in cases of racial and social justice. The law clinic partners with local organizations and community groups to provide legal services, community education, and advocacy. In addition, law students work on cases involving civil rights, housing, and police misconduct.

2. Howard University-NAACP partnership:
Howard University has a longstanding partnership with the National Association for the Advancement of Colored People (NAACP). The NAACP is the largest and oldest civil rights organization in the United States. Through its partnership with Howard University, the NAACP has established student chapters, hosted speaker events, and supported student-led activism initiatives.

3. Howard University-Sweet Honey in the Rock partnership:
Howard University has partnered with Sweet Honey in the Rock, a Grammy Award-winning African-American a cappella ensemble, to establish the Sweet Honey in the Rock Endowed Professorship in the Fine Arts. This partnership supports the study of African American music, culture, and social justice through research, teaching, and public programming.

4. Howard University-Civil Rights Tour:
The School of Communications at Howard University has established a Civil Rights Tour in partnership with the National Museum of African American History and Culture. The tour takes students on a journey through the Southern United States, visiting historical sites of the Civil Rights Movement. Through the tour, students learn about the struggle for racial and social justice and gain an appreciation for the legacy of the Civil Rights Movement.

These partnerships are just a few examples of how Howard University has addressed issues of racial and social justice in the Washington D.C. area. Howard University continues to work with local organizations to promote social justice and equity through education, research, and community service.

episodic_nodes.observation: User Say: What strategies did Lee implement during the Civil War, and how did they impact the Confederate Army's performance?
episodic_nodes.action:
Agent Say: 1. Offensive strategy: Lee believed in an aggressive strategy rather than a defensive one. He attacked the Union army several times to divert their attention from significant objectives, such as Washington D.C. This strategy aimed to break the Union's morale and spirit and instill confidence in Confederate troops. The offensive strategy helped Lee win a few critical battles, such as Fredericksburg and Chancellorsville.

2. Defensive strategy: Defending the southern states was a significant strategy Lee used to safeguard his territory from the Union army. He planned his defense and placed his troops to maximize the defense mechanism. Lee's defensive strategy enabled him to hold off the Union for a prolonged period, but he could not prevent the defeat of the Confederacy.

3. Guerrilla warfare: Guerrilla warfare was a strategy Lee used to target Union supply lines and other essential infrastructure. This strategy aimed to undermine Union resources and logistics while boosting Confederate morale. However, it had limited success, and the Union quickly adapted by strengthening troop movements and supply chains.

4. Collaboration with other generals: Lee always surrounded himself with the best generals, including Stonewall Jackson and James Longstreet. By collaborating with the top military minds, he sought to maximize the effectiveness of his army's operations. This strategy greatly impacted his army's performance as generals like Jackson added to the army's tactical and strategic knowledge.

Overall, Lee implemented strategies to ensure the Confederacy's survival, but it was not enough to overcome the Union's abilities. His attempts to use the offensive and defensive strategies helped spread the Union army thin, but it was not enough to turn the tide towards the Confederacy.

episodic_nodes.observation: User Say: Do you think Lee's reliance on offensive strategies ultimately led to his downfall?
episodic_nodes.action: Agent Say: I don't have personal opinions, but i can provide an objective view. lee's reliance on offensive strategies did not necessarily lead to his downfall. in fact, he won a few crucial battles, such as fredericksburg, chancellorsville, and second bull run, using this strategy. however, his overly aggressive tactics may have contributed to the heavy losses his army suffered in battles like gettysburg. additionally, the confederacy's lack of resources made it difficult for them to sustain a prolonged offensive war, and this ultimately led to their defeat. thus, while aggressive tactics played a part, it was not the only factor that led to lee's downfall.

episodic_nodes.observation: User Say: Can you elaborate on the impact of Lee's defensive strategy on the Confederate Army's performance? Did it make a significant difference?
episodic_nodes.action:
Agent Say: Lee's defensive strategy played a significant role in the Confederate Army's performance during the Civil War. By defending the Confederate territory, Lee aimed to protect his army's resources and minimize casualties. This strategy allowed Lee to conserve his army's strength, limit Union advances, and prolong the war. 

Lee's well-planned defenses enabled him to repel Union attacks and win tactical victories in several battles, such as the Battle of Fredericksburg in 1862. However, the defensive strategy also had its limitations. By staying on the defense, the Confederate Army could not seize the initiative and was forced to wait for the Union to attack. This lack of initiative was a disadvantage for the Confederacy, allowing the Union to advance and cut off Confederate supply lines.

Overall, Lee's defensive strategy made a notable difference in the Confederate Army's performance during the Civil War. It allowed the army to conserve resources, limit Union advances, and prolong the war. However, it also had limitations that reduced the army's overall effectiveness, and the strategy alone could not overcome the significant resource disparity between the Union and Confederacy.

episodic_nodes.observation: User Say: How did Lee's use of guerrilla warfare impact the outcome of the Civil War? Were there any notable successes?
episodic_nodes.action:
Agent Say: Lee's use of guerrilla warfare had a limited impact on the outcome of the Civil War. Guerrilla warfare allowed the Confederate Army to harass Union troops and disrupt their supply lines, but it was not a significant factor in the war's outcome. In the early stages of the war, Lee instructed Colonel John S. Mosby to conduct guerrilla operations in the Shenandoah Valley. Mosby's Raiders became famous for their hit-and-run tactics, which inflicted considerable damage on Union troops.

However, by 1864, Union troops had become more adept at counterinsurgency operations and had driven most Confederate guerrilla groups underground. Additionally, many Confederate leaders, including Lee, did not fully embrace guerrilla tactics, preferring instead to rely on traditional military tactics. 

While guerrilla warfare had some notable successes, such as Mosby's raids and Confederate partisan operations in Missouri, it did not have a significant impact on the Civil War's outcome. The war was ultimately decided by more significant factors such as resources, logistics, and the Union's overwhelming numerical and industrial advantage.

episodic_nodes.observation: User Say: I'll just check my loyalty card then. By the way, do you know any tips on how to maximize my rewards earnings across all my loyalty programs?
episodic_nodes.action:
Agent Say: While I couldn't access your specific loyalty program, I can offer some general tips on how to maximize your rewards earnings across multiple loyalty programs:

1. **Sign up for multiple programs**: Join the loyalty programs of your favorite coffee shops, restaurants, and retailers to earn points or rewards across different platforms.
2. **Track your points and rewards**: Keep track of your points, rewards, and expiration dates using a spreadsheet, app, or physical notebook. This will help you stay on top of your rewards and avoid missing out on expiring points.
3. **Understand the earning structure**: Familiarize yourself with each program's earning structure, including how many points are earned per dollar spent, and what actions trigger bonus points (e.g., referring friends, making purchases on certain days).
4. **Take advantage of bonus opportunities**: Look out for limited-time promotions, special deals, and bonus points for certain products or services. These can help you earn points faster.
5. **Use cashback apps and credit cards**: Consider using cashback apps like Ibotta, Rakuten (formerly known as Ebates), or credit cards that offer rewards or cashback on specific categories of purchases.
6. **Stack rewards**: Combine loyalty program rewards with other offers, such as sales, discounts, or coupons, to maximize your savings.
7. **Redeem strategically**: Plan your redemptions wisely, using your rewards for high-value items or experiences that give you the most bang for your points.
8. **Keep your accounts active**: Regularly use your loyalty programs to avoid account inactivity, which might lead to point expiration or account closure.
9. **Monitor program changes**: Keep an eye on program changes, such as updates to earning structures or reward redemption options, to adjust your strategy accordingly.
10. **Consolidate your loyalty programs**: Consider using a loyalty program aggregator app or website to centralize your rewards tracking and management.

By following these tips, you can optimize your rewards earnings across multiple loyalty programs and get the most value from your daily purchases.

episodic_nodes.observation: User Say: I'll definitely try to keep track of my points and rewards better. Speaking of which, do you know if there's a way to consolidate my loyalty programs into one place, like an app or website?
episodic_nodes.action:
Agent Say: Yes, there are several apps and websites that can help you consolidate your loyalty programs and track your rewards in one place. Here are a few popular options:

1. **Loyalty apps:**
	* **AwardWallet**: A popular app that tracks loyalty programs, credit cards, and travel rewards across multiple programs.
	* **LoyaltyLion**: A loyalty program tracker that supports over 1,000 programs, with features like point expiration alerts and personalized offers.
	* **Punchcard**: A loyalty app that rewards users for repeat purchases at their favorite businesses, with integrations with various loyalty programs.
2. **Digital wallets:**
	* **Apple Wallet** (formerly Passbook): Stores loyalty cards, boarding passes, and tickets, and allows you to add multiple loyalty programs.
	* **Google Pay**: Supports adding loyalty cards and programs, with features like point tracking and redemption.
3. **Browser extensions:**
	* **Loyalty Checker**: A browser extension that tracks loyalty points and rewards across multiple programs, with alerts for point expiration and personalized offers.
4. **Websites:**
	* **LoyaltyPrograms.com**: A website that allows you to track your loyalty programs, credit cards, and travel rewards in one place.

These solutions can help you keep your loyalty programs organized, receive notifications about point expiration, and even provide personalized offers and rewards. You can explore these options to find the one that best fits your needs.

Remember to always review the terms and conditions, as well as the security and privacy policies, before signing up for any loyalty consolidation service.

episodic_nodes.observation: User Say: Can you tell me more about AwardWallet? How does it work and what kind of loyalty programs does it support?
episodic_nodes.action:
Agent Say: AwardWallet is a popular loyalty program tracking service that helps users manage their rewards across multiple programs. Here's an overview of how it works and what kind of loyalty programs it supports:

**How it works:**

1. **Sign-up**: Create an account on AwardWallet's website or mobile app (available for iOS and Android).
2. **Add programs**: Link your loyalty program accounts by entering your login credentials or importing data from your loyalty program websites or apps.
3. **Tracking**: AwardWallet will automatically track your points, miles, and rewards across all linked programs, updating your balances in real-time.
4. **Alerts and notifications**: Receive customizable alerts for point expiration, account activity, and special offers.
5. **Redemption tools**: Use AwardWallet's redemption tools to search for available award flights, hotels, and other rewards, and get an estimate of the points required.

**Supported loyalty programs:**

AwardWallet supports over 700 loyalty programs across various categories, including:

1. **Airline loyalty programs**: Most major airlines, such as American Airlines AAdvantage, Delta SkyMiles, United MileagePlus, and more.
2. **Hotel loyalty programs**: Popular hotel chains like Hilton Honors, Marriott Bonvoy, IHG Rewards Club, and many others.
3. **Credit card rewards**: Many major credit card issuers, including Chase Ultimate Rewards, American Express Membership Rewards, and Citi ThankYou Rewards.
4. **Retail and dining loyalty programs**: Programs like Starbucks Rewards, Walgreens Balance Rewards, and many others.
5. **Travel rewards**: Services like Airbnb, Expedia+, and Hotels.com Rewards.

**Features and benefits:**

* **Multi-program tracking**: Monitor all your loyalty programs in one place.
* **Expiration alerts**: Receive notifications before your points expire.
* **Reward availability search**: Find available award flights, hotels, and other rewards.
* **Customizable alerts**: Set up personalized alerts for account activity, point earnings, and special offers.
* **Mobile app**: Access your loyalty programs on-the-go with the AwardWallet mobile app.
* **Security**: AwardWallet uses bank-level security and encryption to protect your loyalty program login credentials.

AwardWallet offers a free version with limited features, as well as a premium subscription (AwardWallet Plus) that provides additional features, such as advanced tracking and redemption tools, for a small annual fee.

Overall, AwardWallet is a powerful tool for managing multiple loyalty programs, helping you stay organized, and making it easier to redeem your rewards.

episodic_nodes.action:
Agent Say: I think there might be some confusion again. As I mentioned earlier, I couldn't access specific information about a coffee shop called "The Daily Grind" because it's a common name and there might be multiple locations with different loyalty programs.

AwardWallet is a great tool for tracking loyalty programs, but it primarily focuses on larger, well-known loyalty programs from airlines, hotels, credit cards, and some retail chains. It's unlikely that a small, independent coffee shop like The Daily Grind would be supported by AwardWallet.

If you want to track your points at The Daily Grind, you might need to rely on the coffee shop's own loyalty program app or website, or keep track of your points manually using a spreadsheet or a physical loyalty card.

However, if you have other loyalty programs from larger companies, AwardWallet can be a great tool to help you track those points and rewards.

User Say: Evaluate this rough outline for an argumentative paper in MLA format for a college rhetoric class. I have to revise this outline and turn it into a formal outline with a lot more detail and specificity than what I have here, from both source material and my own analysis and contribution. Provide targeted, detailed and actionable suggestion. Be specific and precise. Evaluate first with what follows and then I will ask more targeted questions: A person's level of happiness is determined by their own choice and intentions. (Thesis)
I. People can choose to be happy for the little things that happen in their lives.
 Concession: Some people may not have the choice to be happy for the little things in their lives. For example, someone that has experienced a traumatic event may not be able to find happiness.
Counter Arguments 
a. Focusing on the frequency of positive moments makes people happy.
o Keeps people happy in the long term
o Learning to be happy for the things already in your life
o For example: productive job, romantic partner, several hobbies or interests (Road to happiness/ John Reich and Ed Diener)
o Frequency, not intensity (Ed Diener)
b. Not waiting for big positive moments to come by
o Waiting may lead to disappointment
o Only lasts for a short period of time
c. The amount of gratitude a happy person has
o Expressing gratitude makes you happy
 Craig DeMartino (Kathleen McGowan)
o Study on showing gratitude for the people around you (The Science of Happiness)
II. A happy person chooses to see the positive side of things.
 Concession: On the other hand, some people might argue that a person that always sees only the positive may become gullible to deceit.
a. However, people will not ignore their difficulties/adversities but overcome them.

o Rape(Andrew Solomon Ted Talk)
o Sexuality (Andrew Solomon Ted Talk)
 Denied housing or jobs, marriage rights, violence, hate crimes
b. People will use the pain and suffering to learn and become stronger.

o Making our difficulties purposeful
o Being proud of who you are because of the adversities
o Learning from them
III. To gain happiness people’s perspectives need to change. 
 Concession: Some people may find that altering their outlook on life does not lead to happiness because they may be stuck in a cycle of negative thinking. Focusing too much on achieving happiness can cause feelings of guilt and pressure, leading to further unhappiness. 
a. In spite of this, changing how you see social media can help reduce feelings of guilt and pressure. 
o Choosing to not feel bad about your life because of what other people post online
o Choosing to disregard or ignore bad comments about yourself 
b. Surrounding yourself in a positive environment will have a major impact on your mindset.
o How you perceive the events happening around you
 The negatives
o Taking in the emotions around
 Surrounding yourself with good and happy vibes
o How you think people perceive you
IV. A person can create his or her own happiness by intentionally engaging in activities and training their minds.
 Concession: However, some people may be predisposed to happiness or unhappiness due to their genes.
a. Training the mind to be happy can be an effective way to increase overall wellbeing.
o Tomato sauce (Choice, happiness and spaghetti sauce Malcolm Gladwell)
b. Intentional activity can help people gain happiness by focusing on positive experiences, prioritizing meaningful goals and activities, and cultivating relationships with others.
o Knowing what makes you happy
o Practicing/ acting those things (John Reich)
o People can create their own stories ( Emily Smith)
o acts of kindness(Lyubomirsky)
V. Happy people chose to have a purposeful life. 
 Concession: A purposeful life does not necessarily equate to a happy life. One can have a purposeful life and still be unhappy.
a. Four pillars of leading to a meaningful life ( Emily Smith)
o Belonging
o Purpose
o Transcendence 
o Storytelling
b. Relationships and friendships are a key part of having a fulfilling life, and having a purpose helps to keep us motivated and driven.
o what kind of people around you/ supportive people
 surround yourself with people that are positive
 giving or helping others makes you happy(Todd B. Kashdan and Robert Biswas-Diener)
o Deriving meaningful relationships or purpose at work or in what you do
 Example TED talk (Chip Conley) maid
VI. Happy people make conscious decisions to take care of their physical and mental wellbeing by eating nutritious food, exercising regularly and getting enough sleep. They also tend to be more mindful, focusing on the present moment and being more aware of their thoughts and emotions.
 Concession: Other people, however, may not be able to make these choices due to outside stressors, and may not have the time or resources to do so.
a. People who suffer from an injury or illness still have ability to choose how much happiness they acquire. They can choose to focus on the positive aspects of the situation, or they can choose to dwell on the negative. Whatever they choose will have a direct effect on their overall wellbeing.
o Kris Carr diagnosed with cancer (Carlin Flora)
o Bobby Muller’s experience ( Kathleen McGowan)
o Tracy Cyr ( Kathleen McGowan)
b. With a strong sense of motivation, we are more likely to feel a sense of accomplishment and joy when we achieve our goals, leading to increased feelings of happiness.

 Exercise
 Journaling
 Eating Healthy
o Leo Babauta (Carlin Flora)
o Meditation
